subcodes.first_line: When thy Lord, the Lord of all mankind, makes mention, all remembrances fade away, and the dwellers of Sinai are thunderstruck when the Tree of the All-Merciful gives utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد محت الاذکار عند ذکر ربک مالک الانام و انصعقت الطوریون اذا نطقت سدره الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @procession; appearance of the Word from God
